cards.title: Clinical Scoring Systems
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • CURB-65: Confusion, Urea, RR, BP, Age ≥65 (score 2+ = severe)
  • qSOFA: Altered mentation + RR ≥22 + SBP ≤100
  • Wells DVT/PE score (see Calculators section)
  • GCS: Eye (1-4) + Verbal (1-5) + Motor (1-6) = 3–15
  • Child-Pugh: Hepatic function classification A/B/C
